description_long: This is a small, weathered wooden cabin with a gable roof covered in aged, greenish metal sheets showing significant rust and wear. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, faded to a grayish tone, and the foundation appears to be made of concrete. A prominent stone chimney rises along one side of the cabin, constructed from irregularly shaped stones. There are three visible windows, all rectangular and single-paned, with one on each of the longer sides and one on the gable end. The entrance is accessed by a short set of wooden steps leading to a simple door, and there is no visible porch or veranda.
description: A small, weathered wooden cabin with a rusted metal gable roof, stone chimney, and simple rectangular windows and door.
description_view_0: The gable end of the cabin is visible, featuring a single window and the peak of the roof, with the stone chimney partially visible behind.
description_view_1: A top-down view highlights the rusted metal roof, the stone chimney on one side, and two windows on the longer wall.
description_view_2: The rear gable end is dominated by the tall stone chimney, with no windows or doors visible on this side.
description_view_3: The front facade shows the main entrance door with wooden steps, flanked by a window, and the stone chimney visible to the left.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, covered in rusted metal sheets
attribute_window_arrangement: Three rectangular windows, asymmetrically distributed: one on each long side and one on the gable end, all single-paned and evenly spaced apart
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the long side, accessed by wooden steps, positioned near the corner adjacent to the chimney
